This was my text write up about my clear

Hard 4-10 with Kathi

Replay Code: 3a275f4c-ff55-3962-ad93-91bc78c5fd32#E#a

This took many resets but most were due to me misplaying. The boss will transition phase 1 to phase 2 even if its intent was to attack if you knock its first phase healh bar down to the very last one. Strategy revolved around mostly stalling till turn 15. Kath wheel and cov neccesary. Ryker sigs not necessary just sigil yield mainstats probably for more relic rolls are helpful, I did not trigger his crit rate passive on the SR. Horla wheels are nice but probably not 100% neccesary. Thais wheel is pretty necessary. 

Relic wise, Blessed Blood, Vitlality Injection, Weeping Pipe, Mythag Insignia, were very nice. If you can get posse refunds 25% its also very helpful too.

Dont greed for damage and try to not remove cards from ultra space unless you can shield super well through the incoming attack.

Ryker is there for his card fetch, crit rate up, and card draw.

Horla is there for dirge to stack strength and grief

Tinct is there to clense the weak/vuln and boost crit rate + cheapen hand

DO NOT SELL YOUR STRIKES,  THE BOSS SEALS AWAKENERS THAT HIT IT. I WAS DUMB AND SOLD TINCTS STRIKE.

Aside from Mist Sequence, we are also in talks to collaborate with other titles—including some single-player games that have had a profound influence on members of the B.I.A.V.Studio . I honestly can’t wait to share more detailed information with you once everything is more firmly decided!

this is peak

Our view and planning for collaborations are quite different from most games.

Our focus is not on short-term commercial monetization, but on exploring more possibilities for collaborative works within Morimens. Given that our production capacity has always been limited and precious, we’ve further decided that all collaboration content we create will be designed as long-term, permanent additions to the game. This is the basic premise under which we approach any collab.

Of course, specific titles may still have different licensing terms depending on the situation. In general, the license period will be at least several years, with no limit on the number of uses worldwide. As a result, the rules for obtaining collaboration characters and their rerun plans will, in most cases, be similar to other limited Awakeners in the game. The associated story content will also remain permanently available.

Taking Mist Sequence as an example, the license period is permanent, and we may also release merch for Mouchette from Morimens in the future. For other works with a fixed license term, we will make an announcement before the content is taken down once the term expires.
We’ve noticed that many players are concerned about how long collaboration content will remain in the game, so we hope this dev log can clear up some of those questions.
Aside from Mist Sequence, we are also in talks to collaborate with other titles—including some single-player games that have had a profound influence on members of the B.I.A.V.Studio . I honestly can’t wait to share more detailed information with you once everything is more firmly decided!
